title: Christian Daley
text: Home * People * Christian Daley Christian Daley [1] Christian R. Daley , an American computer scientist and software engineer, M.Sc. in CS from UC Santa Barbara in 2019 [2] . He is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engines JFresh and its successor Spartan [3] .
